import React from "react"; // ✅ Update these paths to match your assets folder structure import whyBg from "../../../assets/why_section_bg.png"; import iconClapper from "../../../assets/clapper_icon.png"; import iconBolt from "../../../assets/bolt_icon.png"; import iconGlobe from "../../../assets/globe_icon.png"; export default function WhySection({ onOpenDemo }) { return (
{/* Background */}
{/* Vignette overlay (dark edges like your target) */}
{/* Content */}

Why CineBridge

Public film licensing redesigned for African cinema.

{/* Card 1 */}

Public screenings
are complicated

  • › Licensing is unclear
  • › Negotiations are slow
  • › Many venues screen films informally
{/* Card 2 (highlight) */}

Pay once.
Screen once.

  • › Download licensed film
  • › Screen it one time
  • › Access automatically expires
{/* Card 3 */}

More African films
on more screens

  • › Legal access for venues
  • › Revenue for filmmakers
  • › Cultural visibility globally
Experience the one-time screening model
); } const S = { section: { position: "relative", width: "100%", padding: "64px 0 72px", overflow: "hidden", color: "#fff", }, // background image bg: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, backgroundSize: "cover", backgroundPosition: "center", filter: "brightness(1.03) contrast(1.02)", transform: "scale(1.02)", }, // vignette overlay (dark edges + readable center) vignette: { position: "absolute", inset: 0, background: "radial-gradient(70% 75% at 50% 28%, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.62) 65%, rgba(0,0,0,0.82) 100%)", zIndex: 1, pointerEvents: "none", }, inner: { position: "relative", zIndex: 2, maxWidth: 1180, margin: "0 auto", padding: "0 22px", textAlign: "center", }, // ✅ closer to your target: smaller + less heavy title: { margin: 0, fontSize: 54, lineHeight: 1.06, fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 0.1, textShadow: "0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, subtitle: { margin: "12px auto 0", maxWidth: 760, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.45, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.65)", textShadow: "0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, grid: { marginTop: 34, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))", gap: 22, alignItems: "stretch", }, // ✅ cleaner card look (transparent + thin border) card: { position: "relative", borderRadius: 10, padding: "26px 26px 22px", background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.22)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,140,30,0.28)", boxShadow: "0 18px 55px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", backdropFilter: "blur(4px)", overflow: "hidden", minHeight: 330, transition: "transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease", }, cardHighlight: { background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.20)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.30)", }, // ✅ thin top glow line like your target cardTopGlow: { position: "absolute", left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, height: 2, background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,160,55,0), rgba(255,160,55,0.55), rgba(255,160,55,0))", opacity: 0.75, pointerEvents: "none", }, // ✅ subtle side glow (reduced) cardSideGlowLeft: { position: "absolute", left: -25, top: "30%", width: 50, height: "45%", background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,150,40,0.18), rgba(255,150,40,0) 70%)", filter: "blur(10px)", pointerEvents: "none", }, cardSideGlowRight: { position: "absolute", right: -25, top: "30%", width: 50, height: "45%", background: "radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,150,40,0.18), rgba(255,150,40,0) 70%)", filter: "blur(10px)", pointerEvents: "none", }, // ✅ icon size closer to target cardIcon: { width: 54, height: 54, objectFit: "contain", margin: "0 auto 14px", filter: "drop-shadow(0 6px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.40))", }, // ✅ smaller heading like target cardHeading: { margin: 0, fontSize: 28, lineHeight: 1.2, fontWeight: 700, textShadow: "0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)", }, orange: { color: "#F3A12B" }, // ✅ subtle divider line rule: { height: 1, margin: "18px 0 16px", background: "linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255,160,55,0), rgba(255,160,55,0.18), rgba(255,160,55,0))", }, // ✅ spacing like target list: { listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: 0, textAlign: "left", display: "grid", gap: 12, }, li: { display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 12, fontSize: 18, lineHeight: 1.45, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.68)", }, chev: { color: "#F3A12B", fontWeight: 800, transform: "translateY(2px)", minWidth: 14, }, ctaWrap: { marginTop: 34, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, }, ctaText: { fontSize: 20, color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.62)", textShadow: "0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", }, // ✅ flatter + wider button (target look) ctaBtn: { display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, padding: "16px 34px", minWidth: 420, justifyContent: "center", borderRadius: 8, border: "1px solid rgba(255,160,55,0.35)", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #FFAE2B 0%, #D35F12 100%)", boxShadow: "0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", cursor: "pointer", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 22, lineHeight: 1, textShadow: "0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)", transition: "transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, filter 180ms ease", }, // play icon pill (left) playPill: { width: 38, height: 38, borderRadius: 999, background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.16)", display: "grid", placeItems: "center", boxShadow: "inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", }, playTriangle: { width: 0, height: 0, borderTop: "8px solid transparent", borderBottom: "8px solid transparent", borderLeft: "12px solid #fff", transform: "translateX(1px)", filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.40))", }, ctaLabel: { whiteSpace: "nowrap" }, };
